metadata.title: Raio - Training is a feeling.
metadata.description: Handcrafted kettlebells and training tools made of Estonian stone and wood. Training is a feeling.

hero.imageAlt: A man carrying a RA•IO stone kettlebell at sunset
hero.copy: Handcrafted kettlebells and training tools made of Estonian stone and local wood.

philosophy.body: RA•IO is built for those who seek more than simple training. It is a connection with nature, your body and community. The weight of stone, the warmth of wood, presence in the moment — here, lasting strength is born.
philosophy.imageAlt: Athlete carrying stone kettlebells on a forest trail

metadata.title: Training | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO training brings together strength, endurance, and mindful movement with the rhythm of nature.

training.label: Training
heroText: RA•IO training brings together strength, endurance, and mindful movement with the rhythm of nature.
All of nature is your training ground.
training.listIntro: We offer a range of trainings that support both body and mind. Choose the format that suits you and connect through movement - with yourself, nature, and community.

trainings.title: Functional training
trainings.description: All-round development of the body through natural movement patterns and varied tasks.
body: Functional training develops strength, mobility, balance, and endurance as one whole. The movements come from real body needs, not fixed machine paths.
We use bodyweight, natural tools, and the possibilities of the surrounding space. Every exercise helps build better body control and confidence in everyday movement.
It suits people who want to train with variety, awareness, and the rhythm of nature.

trainings.title: Strength & endurance training
trainings.description: A focus on strength, endurance, and building physical capacity with natural tools.
body: This session focuses on stronger effort: carrying capacity, grip, core work, and longer work capacity.
We use natural weights, kettlebells, bodyweight, and intervals with changing pace. The focus is clean technique and the ability to keep quality under fatigue.
It suits participants who already have a base and want to take their physical capacity further.

trainings.title: Mobility & flexibility
trainings.description: Training for mobility, flexibility, and body awareness that helps prevent injuries and improves movement quality.
body: Mobility training helps the body move more freely and safely. We focus on joint control, breathing, balance, and entering range of motion calmly.
This is not just stretching. The exercises teach the body to create strength in positions where uncertainty or tension usually appears.
It works well as a restorative session and as support for stronger training.

trainings.title: Ritual movement & breathing
trainings.description: A slowing, grounding blend of practices that supports the nervous system, clarity, and inner balance.
body: Ritual movement creates room to slow down. The focus is breathing, presence, and restoring connection with the body.
The practice can include gentle movement sequences, contact with the ground, conscious breathing, and moments of silence. The goal is not maximum output, but nervous-system balance.
It suits anyone who wants more calm, attention, and inner clarity in their training.

lasting.title: Training that stays with you afterwards.
lasting.text: Our trainings take place in small groups, in carefully chosen places, where we can focus on what is essential - quality and a real experience.
lasting.imageAlt: A training group by a lake in nature

workshop.title: Want to host a training or workshop?
workshop.text: We offer options for private and corporate groups. Write to us and we'll create the right experience together.

metadata.title: Tools | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO handcrafted training tools made of wood and stone.

tools.label: Tools
heroText: RA•IO tools are handcrafted training tools that combine the strength of nature, simplicity, and timeless durability.

categories.description: Staffs, clubs, and other wooden training tools.

categories.title: Kettlebells
categories.description: Stone kettlebells and wood & stone kettlebells.

categories.title: Dumbbells

categories.title: For children
categories.description: Safe, natural training tools made for children.

categories.title: Other tools
categories.description: Additional tools to add variety to your movement.

material.title: Why wood and stone?
material.text: Wood and stone are natural, durable, and timeless materials that create a genuine connection to the ground in training. Each tool is unique - in its shape, weight, and texture.
material.imageAlt: Natural stone as a training tool material

values.title: Balance with nature
values.text: Natural materials support the body's natural development and functional movement.

values.title: Timeless quality
values.text: Each tool is made to last for years and to become even more characterful over time.

values.title: A genuine experience
values.text: Training that doesn't depend on trends, but rests on lasting value and feel.

care.title: Care
lines: Clean with a damp cloth after training.
Avoid keeping it in water for long periods.
If the wood dries out, treat it with natural oil as needed.
Cared for properly, they last for generations.
care.imageAlt: Cleaning a kettlebell with a cloth

custom.title: Want a custom solution?
lines: We also make tools to order, with the weight, size, or material that suits your wishes.
Get in touch and we'll create something unique.
custom.imageAlt: A stone training tool by a lake

metadata.title: Events | RA•IO
metadata.description: RA•IO events bring together movement, nature, and community.

events.label: Events
heroText: RA•IO events bring together movement, nature, and community.
Trainings, workshops, and challenges that create space to grow.

events.title: Morning movement by the river
events.description: Functional training in nature. Breathing, strength, and presence.
body: We start the day with a calm warm-up, breathing, and natural movement patterns. The focus is waking the body, not rushing.
The session brings together bodyweight work, natural tools, and the surrounding space. The river setting helps keep presence and gives movement a grounded rhythm.
It is for people who want to begin the day with a clearer head, a stronger body, and a calmer nervous system.

events.title: Kettlebell workshop
events.description: Learn kettlebell technique, use, and history.
body: In the workshop we cover the foundations of kettlebell movement: grip, breathing, hip drive, and controlled use of strength.
We explore how a natural-material tool behaves in the hand and how to train with clean technique while keeping the body safe.
The day works both as a first introduction and for people who want to make their movement more precise.

events.title: Sunrise training and swim
events.description: Movement, cold water, and a morning ritual.
body: We meet before the day begins to move in sunrise light and give the body a clear, calm start.
Training is followed by a mindful swim focused on breath, presence, and listening to the body. Cold water is not a competition; it is a ritual.
This event is made for people looking for a simple, strong, and memorable morning experience.

events.title: Strength evening & sauna ritual
events.description: An evening strength session, fire, sauna, and a circle of conversation.
body: The evening begins with strength training using bodyweight and natural tools. The pace is strong, but conscious.
After training we move into recovery and a sauna ritual. Fire, heat, and conversation create space for the body to settle.
The experience connects effort, recovery, and community. It is more than a workout: it is a full evening in nature.

host.title: Host your own event.
host.text: Company days, workshops, and movement experiences in nature.
host.imageAlt: A forest event area with kettlebells and wooden training tools

journal.label: RA•IO+
heroText: Here you'll find stories about training, nature, the craft of making, and everyday movement.

articles.title: The power of morning movement
articles.excerpt: Why early-morning training brings clarity, energy, and calm to the day.
body: Early-morning movement gives the day a different beginning. The body wakes before the noise, thoughts become clearer, and training becomes more than effort: it becomes orientation.
Moving outdoors creates space to notice breath, temperature, and rhythm. Every step or repetition becomes a simple way to return to the body.
RA•IO mornings are built around calm consistency. Not maximum pace, but presence that stays with you through the day.

articles.title: Made by hand
articles.excerpt: Every tool is made by hand. From choosing the materials to the finish - the story behind the process.
body: Handcraft begins by listening to the material. Wood and stone are not standard blanks, but living forms whose shape and weight guide the whole process.
Each tool is made slowly: selection, balance, sanding, and finish. The result matters, but so does the feeling that the tool belongs naturally in the hand.
That is why no two RA•IO tools are exactly the same. It is part of their strength and character.

articles.title: Functional strength in nature
articles.excerpt: How to build strength, endurance, and mobility using the body and nature.
body: Functional strength is not only about lifting weight. It is the ability to move, balance, breathe, and carry strength through changing situations.
Nature gives training shifting conditions: ground, weather, space, and tools ask the body to adapt. Practical strength is built inside that adaptation.
In RA•IO training, strength, endurance, and mobility work together so the body becomes more ready beyond the training session.

articles.title: Silence as a source of strength
articles.excerpt: Why time spent in silence helps strengthen focus, the nervous system, and inner resilience.
body: Silence is not emptiness. It is an environment where the body can notice what is truly tense and what needs to be released.
When training leaves room for silence, effort becomes more precise. Movement is no longer only about an external result, but a practice of inner focus.
That is why RA•IO experiences always make space for slowing down. Strength needs recovery as much as effort.

articles.title: Wood and stone - a timeless pairing
articles.excerpt: Natural materials that endure over time and support our movement.
body: Wood and stone carry a simple honesty. They do not need excessive design, because their weight, texture, and temperature already speak clearly.
As training tools, they create direct contact between the ground, the hand, and movement. Stone gives weight; wood gives grip and warmth.
With care, the tool becomes more personal over time. Wear does not weaken it; it adds layers to its story.

articles.title: Recovery in nature
articles.excerpt: How nature helps reduce stress and improves our physical and mental well-being.
body: Recovery does not always mean complete stillness. Often it means changing the environment, lowering the pace, and bringing attention back to breathing.
In nature, the need to constantly react begins to soften. Sound, light, and open space help the nervous system settle and the body recover from training.
For RA•IO, nature is both a training ground and a recovery space. Both belong to the same whole.

signup.title: Join RA•IO+
signup.text: From time to time we send good thoughts, news, and stories that support your journey.

metadata.title: About | RA•IO
metadata.description: The RA•IO story — movement, handmade tools, and experiences in nature.

about.label: About
heroText: RA•IO exists so these three are not separate things, but one whole journey back to the body and to nature.
story: The brand's public name is RA•IO and the legal company is Raio33Movement OÜ.
There is room here for movement, events, and handcrafted tools alike - all born from the same wish to move slower, by hand, and for real.
about.storyImageAlt: RA•IO stone training tool with a moss-covered handle

values.text: Natural, mindful movement in the rhythm of nature.

values.title: Craft
values.text: Handmade tools of stone and wood, built to last.

values.title: Experience
values.text: Events and presence that connect people and nature.

trainers.name: Rainer Olei
